scripts.test: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test
scripts.test:coverage: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test sh -c 'npx prisma migrate deploy && npx jest --coverage --forceExit'
scripts.db:audit-logs: docker exec flowboard-db psql -U postgres -d flowboard -c 'SELECT * FROM "AuditLog" ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC LIMIT 10;'
